description:
Walk the AST and synthesize a Descr for each expression. Bidirectional: synth mode for most, check mode where an expected type is known.

Scope: literals, vars (lookup in env), binops (with primitive overload resolution via intersection), if/else (union of branch types), case (union of clause body types under refined env), let/match.

Defer: full polymorphism (start monomorphic), recursive type definitions.

Deliverable: src/typer.rs with infer(env, expr) -> Descr.
title: Local type inference for expressions
